9.reason: Array index out of bounds: accessing c[-1] when j=0 causes undefined behavior.

13.reason: This loop overwrites c[j] repeatedly without incrementing j; logic for skipping spaces is flawed.

15.reason: Overwrites the same c[j] index, does not advance j; may cause infinite loop or missing characters.
